title: Settings
export_data_loading_message: Downloading data. This can take some time, especially if you have many pictures.

delete_pictures.title: Delete all photos?
delete_pictures.description: All photos will be permanently deleted from the server. This cannot be undone.

delete_account_description: Your account and all data will be permanently deleted from the server. This cannot be undone.
about_text: A server to communicate with the FMD Android app, to locate and control your devices.
